textByHashes.70e905d3a711db852ec3db3a430f15d08de8e614: Oh, I like to keep ahead of things.
textByHashes.7932c5e5b17c823ded26d88ad9004aa4b84b1884: How did you know! I found the most awful thing in my sandpit - a head!
textByHashes.e36b45e4d6d01c86c1eb14c0fb047d4a5ef4b19a: You're very strange, but if it means I get rid of the horrid thing...
textByHashes.14eeac1854254a4fb217b61c9a56d34816bfc1ff: Or I would if you had any room in your bag!
textByHashes.659bf07d0bc7233c4429a94b9cb7fe4fec0c6ee6: I see you still have that head! Take it back to the Wizards in Yanille!
textByHashes.3f2522af6b9c03aaa7585c05dad56f4f4af68638: It was you that came demanding the head to give to the wizard in the first place! Go back to Yanille with it!
textByHashes.2ae2ab5d4cad5793c805ad9719a87fbf80184763: You dropped it and you don't have room to carry it now, come back when you do.
textByHashes.d2788829f56d9f4689e07bf154b1612b44fd9605: Keep your hair on! You dropped it! Make sure you take it straight back to the wizards else you won't have a leg to stand on.
textByHashes.e910f437056b2a5043f166de0906fb421d3bc81a: Please leave me alone, a parrot stole my banana.
